title: Make "images.push" method support "format" parameter
body:
Some repositories (`AWS lambdas` in `ECR`) have issues with the `oci` manifest format and require the manifest be pushed in the `docker/v2s2` format.

**API reference:**
- https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/images/operation/ImagePushLibpod

**Fix for:**
- https://github.com/containers/podman-py/issues/399
